# pfsense_certificates (Data Source)

Retrieves all [certificates](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/certificates/index.html) from the pfSense certificate manager.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_certificates" "all" {}

output "cert_names" {
  value = [for cert in data.pfsense_certificates.all.certificates : cert.descr]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `certificates` (Attributes List) List of certificates. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--certificates))

<a id="nestedatt--certificates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `certificates`

Read-Only:

- `caref` (String) Reference ID of the signing certificate authority. Empty for self-signed or externally signed certificates.
- `certificate` (String, Sensitive) PEM-encoded certificate.
- `descr` (String) Descriptive name for the certificate.
- `has_private_key` (Boolean) Whether the certificate has a private key stored.
- `in_use` (Boolean) Whether the certificate is referenced by services or other configuration.
- `is_self_signed` (Boolean) Whether the certificate is self-signed.
- `issuer` (String) Certificate issuer (distinguished name).
- `private_key` (String, Sensitive) PEM-encoded private key for the certificate.
- `refid` (String) Unique reference ID assigned by pfSense.
- `serial` (String) Certificate serial number.
- `subject` (String) Certificate subject (distinguished name).
- `type` (String) Certificate type. Options: `server`, `user`.
- `valid_from` (String) Certificate validity start date.
- `valid_to` (String) Certificate validity end date.
